boundary: Routing fidelity vs author labels only — NOT a real-decision effect. No claim that the gate detects drift from raw text without an explicit anchor. canClaimAGI:false.
finding: Explicit-anchor routing 0.75 vs derived-goal routing 0.5 (gap 0.25). The derived signal is weaker BY DESIGN (fail-closed: the gate cannot flag drift from a goal it cannot read); the fix is model-gated behind the default-off goal-extraction seam, not a threshold relaxation.
